arts.ttl: Why Man Utd, Liverpool, Arsenal and Barcelona aren't in the Club World Cup 2025
arts.sum: In Europe, Chelsea, Real Madrid (twice) and Manchester City are the teams that have won the Champions League since 2020/21, thus securing automatic qualification for the Club World Cup. 12 European sides will compete in the United States and their participation in the tournament is based on Champions League performances over the past four seasons, with all winners from 2020/21 to 2023/24 automatically reaching the group stage.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes Manchester City sack admission as Arsenal and Chelsea watch on
arts.sum: Ilkay Gundogan attributed the team's woes to low morale and a "mental issue" but Guardiola dismissed this notion post-match, maintaining that his squad performed well against Juventus. However, in a candid conversation with ex-Brescia colleague Luca Toni on Prime Video Sport, Guardiola opened up about the personal toll of City's downturn, saying: "Do Man City send me home?

arts.ttl: Alessio Russo at the double as Arsenal see off Valerenga in Champions League
arts.sum: The result keeps the Gunners one point behind Group C leaders Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: £200m Bramley Moore Dock stadium naming rights update as Everton partners strike major deal
Saka stars as Arsenal beat Monaco
arts.sum: Watch highlights as Bukayo Saka scores twice in Arsenal's 3-0 victory against Monaco in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: 'Fair play': Paul Merson says Arsenal have three young players in their ranks who are truly outstanding
arts.sum: Arsenal are in a great place at the minute, showing why they are among the favourites to win the Premier League title and the Champions...

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans mocked after mural of set-piece coach unveiled outside Emirates
arts.sum: Arsenal have now scored 22 goals from corners since the start of last season after Nicolas Jover began working his magic on the squad, and some fans have been so impressed they've created a mural of the coach

arts.ttl: Surprise Myles Lewis-Skelly scout report emerges prior to Arsenal breakthrough
arts.sum: Little over a year before making his full Arsenal debut in the Champions League, 18-year-old Myles Lewis-Skelly was being described as 'too laid back, 'relaxed' as he 'found it tough' at academy level, according to an old scout report. And that is what makes a scout report written about Lewis-Skelly in August 2023 after an Arsenal Under-21s match against West Ham - now revealed by The Daily Mail - so astonishing.

arts.ttl: Roberto Olabe's best signings as Mikel Arteta's preference to replace Edu Gaspar now made clear, amid reports
arts.sum: The Spaniard signed a £63m player for just £8m... ❗️

arts.ttl: Thierry Henry shows true colours as Arsenal legend makes allegiances clear with Barcelona claim
arts.sum: The 47-year-old was on punditry duties for CBS Sports when Mikel Arteta's team stormed past the French outfit in the Champions League on Wednesday night. With all four of Henry's former European teams playing in the Champions League that night, the Frenchman was quizzed on where his loyalty lies .
